name: CodeNode performance & risk metrics (single symbol)
description: StartNode -> OverseasStockBrokerNode -> OverseasStockHistoricalDataNode(AAPL, 1d, 120 bars) -> CodeNode(hand-rolled Sharpe/Sortino/max-drawdown/Calmar/volatility from a close series, stdlib only) -> SummaryDisplayNode. Educational hand-roll reference for the SharpeRatioMonitor/SortinoRatio/CalmarRatio plugins. sd==0 or no-downside cases return None (not NaN); status is carried inside 'metrics'. dry_run-safe.
